Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Economics Games Timer App

Multi-page Streamlit app for University of Waikato High School Economics Outreach featuring:
- Build a Country \(Economics & Policy game\)
- Beat the Market \(Investment & Finance game\)
- Crypto Crash or Boom \(Fintech & Risk game\)

Features:
- Admin panel with QR code generation for teams
- Real-time timer and round management
- Live scoreboard with auto-refresh
- Decision locking with confirmation
- Game instructions and scoring explanations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
